RawContract.description: Intermediate type for a single energy contract entry.

bus_id.description: Bus at which the contracted power is injected or withdrawn.

entry_stage_id.description: Stage index when the contract enters service. Absent or null = always active.

exit_stage_id.description: Stage index when the contract expires. Absent or null = never expires.

id.description: Contract identifier. Must be unique within the file.

limits.description: Nested limits object with min and max MW bounds.

price_per_mwh.description: Contract price per `MWh`. May be negative for export revenue [$/`MWh`].

type.description:
Direction of energy flow. Uses `#[serde(rename = "type")]` since `type`
is a Rust keyword.

RawContractLimits.description: Intermediate type for the nested limits sub-object.

RawContractType.description:
Raw intermediate enum for contract direction.

Uses `#[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]` to map JSON `"import"`/`"export"`
to Rust `Import`/`Export` variants. The core `ContractType` enum does not
carry `rename_all`, so we use this intermediate.

oneOf.description: External energy flows into the modeled system.
System energy flows out to an external entity.

description: Top-level intermediate type for `energy_contracts.json` (serde only, not re-exported).
title: RawContractFile
